references.text: Backer, CA. 1951. Hydrophyllaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 207-209
Davenport, LJ. 1988. A monograph of Hydrolea (Hydrophyllaceae). Rhodora 90: 169-208.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 9 June 2025

species.citation: (L.) Vahl , Symb. Bot. (Vahl) 2 (1791) 46 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 392; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 372; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 207; ≡ Nama zeylanica L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 226.
species.distribution: Borneo, India, Java, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra. CEBU, LUZON: Bataan, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines Sur (photos), Laguna (photos), NCR, Rizal, MINDANAO: Davao, PANAY, SAMAR (photos).
species.notes: Permanently or periodically swampy or inundated sites, rice paddies, shallow pools and river banks. 0-1000m.
